text:
Affairs
L- Liability insurance
1 - Potential workers' compensation
2 - Potential black lung
3 - Potential Dept. of Veterans Affairs
Null/Missing - No other primary payer besides Medicare
 E_BUYIN_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Part A and/or B Entitlement Indicator. January through December 0 - Not Entitled
1 - Part A Only
2 - Part B Only
3 - Part A and Part B
A - Part A, State Buy-in
B - Part B, State buy-in
C - Parts A and B, State Buy-in
 E_MEDICAREMA_1 - 12 Monthly Medicare Managed Care
